  "findings": [
    "Breaker and conductor ampacity mismatch staged for installation",
    "Potential violation of conductor overcurrent protection limits"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the mismatched overcurrent protective device with one matching the conductor's allowable ampacity",
    "Verify conductor termination temperature ratings under NEC 110.14(C) before final installation"
  ],
  "rationale": "The staged materials exhibit a mismatch between the overcurrent protective device (breaker) rating and the conductor ampacity. Installing a breaker with an ampacity rating exceeding the allowable ampacity of the associated conductor creates a severe fire and shock hazard, violating basic safety requirements of NEC 240.4.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240.4",
    "NEC 110.14(C)"
  ]
}
